prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Hey, I know you've been putting off that hard task all morning, but I believe in you! You've got this! Remember how accomplished and proud you'll feel once it's done? That feeling is so worth the effort you're about to put in. Just take a deep breath, break it down into smaller manageable steps, and tackle one at a time. You've got the skills, the smarts, and the determination to crush this. You've done hard things before, and this is just another one to add to your list of victories. You've got this, go get 'em!
